calendar.matters:
Petition To Modify Trust And Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar May-16-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Lippett for Joan Solomon.

The Court granted Petition to Modify Trust and Appoint Successor Trustee (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Anasse.
